items.title: JWST Cycle 6 Call for Proposals - NASA Science
items.content_text: We are pleased to announce the Cycle 6 Call for Proposals for JWST General Observer (GO), Survey, and Archival Research (AR) programs. Proposals are due on 30 September 2026.

items.title: Weekend Departure Preps Continue as Crew Works Science, Spacesuits - NASA
items.content_text: Three Expedition 74 crew members are nearing the end of their stay aboard the International Space Station handing over mission responsibilities and packing up cargo for return to Earth. Science hardware, lab maintenance, and spacesuits kept the rest of the crew busy aboard the orbital outpost.
